plan_metadata.name: group fill in azure serarch playground

steps.description: Click after the "=" sign on the AZURE_OPENAI_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT_NAME line in the .env.playground.user file within Visual Studio Code's editor.
Type #text:"text-embedding-ada-002" into the AZURE_OPENAI_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT_NAME field in the  file using the Visual Studio Code editor.
Press the Down Arrow key to move the cursor from line 7 to line 8 in the file within Visual Studio Code.
Type ${{env:AZURE_SEARCH_KEY}}  in the  file next to AZURE_OPENAI_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT_NAME, using the Visual Studio Code editor.
Press the Down Arrow key to move the cursor from the end of line 8 to the start of line 9 in the  file within Visual Studio Code.
Type ${{env:AZURE_SEARCH_ENDPOINT}} into the AZURE_SEARCH_KEY field in the file within Visual Studio Code.
Save changes to the file in Visual Studio Code by pressing Ctrl+S while the file is open and focused in the editor.
Right-click on the tab for ".env.playground.user" at the top of the Visual Studio Code editor to open the tab context menu.
Click the "Close" option at the top of the context menu in Visual Studio Code to close the selected file tab (".env.playground.user").
